name: Golgotha
oracleText:
Golgotha enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
flavorText: "Father, forgive them; for they know not what they do." — Luke 23:34
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "What Our Lord Saw from the Cross" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Place of the Skull

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, What Our Lord Saw from the Cross
classics.sourceNotes: This provides a strong Golgotha-centered view for the place-of-the-skull card.
